item.text: I’m checking the workspace manifests directly and will only report crates whose own `Cargo.toml` files list `orbit-knowledge` as a dependency entry.
The first pass didn’t return results, so I’m narrowing it to the repository root and reading the matching manifests directly to verify each dependency stanza.

[package]
name = "orbit-tools"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
license.workspace = true

[dependencies]
chrono.workspace = true
orbit-exec = { path = "../orbit-exec" }
orbit-knowledge = { path = "../orbit-knowledge" }
orbit-policy = { path = "../orbit-policy" }
orbit-common = { path = "../orbit-common" }
regex.workspace = true
serde.workspace = true
serde_json.workspace = true
sha2.workspace = true
thiserror.workspace = true

[dev-dependencies]
rusqlite.workspace = true
tempfile = "3"

[package]
name = "orbit-cli"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
license.workspace = true

[[bin]]
name = "orbit"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
axum.workspace = true
chrono.workspace = true
clap.workspace = true
colored = "2"
comfy-table = "7"
csv = "1"
orbit-common = { path = "../orbit-common" }
orbit-core = { path = "../orbit-core", features = ["clap"] }
orbit-knowledge = { path = "../orbit-knowledge" }
orbit-mcp = { path = "../orbit-mcp" }
regex.workspace = true
serde.workspace = true
serde_json.workspace = true
serde_yaml.workspace = true
tokio.workspace = true
toml.workspace = true

[dev-dependencies]

predicates = "3"

serde_yaml.workspace = true
tempfile = "3"
toml.workspace = true
